paper_title: Networked Implementation: Structure and Rhythmicity at Organizational Scale

phase_ready.note: Retroactive AI layer from build table and bootstrap descriptions. Paper published but pending framing review. C3 unsatisfied: EVALUATION clauses need empirical protocol detail from full paper text. C5/C6 pending full claim audit against prose.

claim_registry.label: [TYPE:A]
claim_registry.name: Network is literal, not metaphorical
claim_registry.statement: An organization is a network in the precise sense of P1 Definition A-1.3: a set of nodes and directed edges with coupling κ. The term 'network' is not a metaphor — it is the thing itself.

claim_registry.label: [TYPE:A]
claim_registry.name: Organizational substrate satisfies FRM conditions
claim_registry.statement: Organizational networks satisfy conditions C1–C4 of P1 Section 2: they transmit information across time between distinguishable states via coupling of nodes.

claim_registry.label: [TYPE:D]
claim_registry.name: FRM at organizational scale
claim_registry.statement: f(t) = B + A·e^(−λt)·cos(ωt + φ) describes adaptive response at organizational scale, where τ_gen is the organization-specific generation timescale.

claim_registry.label: [TYPE:D]
claim_registry.name: Organizational coupling κ
claim_registry.statement: Coupling coefficient κ at organizational scale is the ratio of active information-transmitting edges to possible edges in the organizational network. This is a measurable quantity, not a metaphor.

claim_registry.label: [TYPE:F]
claim_registry.name: Organizational β = 1/2
claim_registry.statement: The critical exponent β = 1/2 holds at organizational scale: T_org = 4·τ_gen_org for organizational networks.

WHERE.mean_β_org: scalar · dimensionless · mean β_measured across organizational substrates using P3 Section 4 protocol
WHERE.σ_β: scalar · dimensionless · standard error of β across organizational substrates

falsification_predicate.EVALUATION: Fit FRM to organizational time series data; extract ω; compute β = ω·τ_gen/(π); average across substrates; compare to 0.5 ± 2σ; finite
falsification_predicate.BOUNDARY: Exact equality → NOT FALSIFIED (measure zero for continuous β)
falsification_predicate.CONTEXT: [PLACEHOLDER: pending empirical validation with organizational time series data] — resolves PH-1.1 for organizational class

claim_registry.label: [TYPE:F]
claim_registry.name: FRM fit quality at organizational scale
claim_registry.statement: FRM provides R² ≥ 0.85 fit to organizational adaptive response data, and no alternative functional form achieves R²_alt ≥ R²_frm + 0.05.

WHERE.R2_frm_org: scalar · dimensionless · R² of FRM fit to organizational time series
WHERE.R2_best_alt_org: scalar · dimensionless · R² of best alternative functional form (exponential, power-law, linear)

falsification_predicate.EVALUATION: Fit FRM and three alternative forms to organizational data; compare R² values; finite
falsification_predicate.CONTEXT: Instantiation of P1 F-1.1 at organizational scale. Conservative threshold accounts for overfitting in higher-parameter alternatives.

claim_registry.label: [TYPE:F]
claim_registry.name: Structure and rhythmicity necessary at organizational scale
claim_registry.statement: Organizational networks exhibit both structure (differential association between nodes) and rhythmicity (oscillatory carrier maintaining signal). Neither property alone is sufficient.

falsification_predicate.FALSIFIED_IF: EXISTS organizational_network ON SUCH THAT (FRM_conditions(ON) = TRUE) AND ((channel_1_absent(ON) = TRUE) OR (channel_2_absent(ON) = TRUE)) AND (information_transmission_persists(ON) = TRUE)

WHERE.channel_1_absent: boolean · TRUE if no measurable differential association between nodes
WHERE.channel_2_absent: boolean · TRUE if no detectable oscillatory component in time series
WHERE.information_transmission_persists: boolean · TRUE if network continues to transmit information across time

falsification_predicate.EVALUATION: Measure Channel 1 (structural) and Channel 2 (rhythmic) indicators; test if information transmission persists when either is absent; finite
falsification_predicate.CONTEXT: [PLACEHOLDER: pending empirical measurement protocol for organizational networks]

placeholder_register.description: Organizational β = 1/2 empirical validation. Requires organizational time series data with known τ_gen.
placeholder_register.target_session: OPEN — resolves with empirical data collection

placeholder_register.description: Necessity of both structure and rhythmicity at organizational scale. Requires measurement protocol.
placeholder_register.target_session: OPEN — resolves with organizational measurement protocol
